# libredash data plan

Plan a local managed data revision

## Usage

```sh
libredash data plan [flags]
```

## Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--connection` | string | `` | project-global managed connection |
| `--from` | string | `` | local filesystem root to ingest |
| `--previous-manifest` | string | `` | prior managed data manifest path |
| `--project` | string | `dashboards/libredash.yaml` | project path |
